name: Oikawa Tōru
quote: The greatest miracle is your existence.
messageTemplate: Oya oya? Is it really your birthday, {name}-chan? *flips hair* Even someone as talented as me takes a moment to bow for you today. You're a true setter — always making everyone around you shine. Happy {age}th! Don't forget, the greatest miracle is your existence. ✨🏐

name: Levi Ackerman
messageTemplate: Tch. Don't get all teary-eyed just because it's your birthday. But... I'll say this once — you've made it {age} years and you're still standing. That takes real strength. So happy birthday, {name}. Don't waste this year. ⚔️

name: Eren Yeager
messageTemplate: You were born free, {name}. And {age} years later you're still fighting for your dreams. I see the fire in you — that same freedom-hungry flame. Keep moving forward. No matter what walls they build around you, you'll break through. Happy Birthday! 🔑🌊

name: Sasuke Uchiha
messageTemplate: ...I don't usually say these things. But you've walked your own path and that demands respect. {age} is not the end — it's a new power awakening. Don't rely on others for your strength, {name}. You already have everything you need inside you. 🌀⚡

name: Naruto Uzumaki
messageTemplate: HAPPY BIRTHDAY {NAME}!! BELIEVE IT!! 🎉 Dattebayo! You're {age} and absolutely AWESOME! I know sometimes the path is hard and you feel alone but I promise — your ninja way is worth it! Ramen's on me today! 🍜🍥

name: Gojo Satoru
quote: Throughout heaven and earth, I alone am the honored one.
messageTemplate: Yooo {name}~ Happy Birthday! 🎂 Being {age} is pretty great — almost as great as being me. *lifts blindfold* I'm using my Six Eyes just to see how bright your future is... and trust me, it's BLINDING. You're the strongest version of yourself yet! 💙✨

name: Okkotsu Yuta
quote: I'll find a reason to live.
messageTemplate: Happy Birthday, {name}. I know what it feels like to wonder if you're enough... But {age} years of surviving this world? That's proof you are. You have more strength inside you than you realize. I believe in you — and so does everyone who loves you. 💍🌸

name: Maki Zenin
quote: I'll destroy everything that holds me back.
messageTemplate: {name}. Happy Birthday. No cursed energy? No special powers? Good — you don't need any of that. {age} years and you're still proving everyone wrong. That's real strength. Don't let anyone define your limits. Break through them all. 🔱💚

name: Itachi Uchiha
quote: You don't have to forgive me... just know the truth.
messageTemplate: {name}... Happy Birthday. The path of {age} years has been long. You've carried burdens others couldn't see. But true strength isn't about power — it's about the love you protect silently. Never lose sight of what truly matters. 🌙❤️

name: Minato Namikaze
quote: The Yellow Flash believes in you.
messageTemplate: Happy Birthday, {name}! ⚡ Being a father taught me the most important jutsu — believing in the next generation. At {age}, you're proof that the Will of Fire lives on. You're faster than you think, brighter than you know. Flash forward! 💛✨

name: Hinata Hyuga
quote: I never go back on my word. That's my nindō.
messageTemplate: H-Happy Birthday, {name}-san! *blushes* I... I want you to know that turning {age} is something to be proud of. You've been so brave, even when you felt small. Your kindness is your greatest strength. Never give up! 🤍💜

name: Aizen Sōsuke
quote: Since when were you under the impression you weren't special?
messageTemplate: Happy Birthday, {name}. *adjusts glasses* Turning {age} was always part of my plan. Everything in your life has led to this moment — each triumph, each struggle, perfectly orchestrated. Since when were you under the impression you weren't extraordinary? 🪑👑

name: Nico Robin
messageTemplate: Happy Birthday, {name}. The world tried to tell me I shouldn't exist... but I found people who said otherwise. At {age}, I hope you've found yours too. Your story is a treasure — every chapter matters, even the dark ones. 📚🌺

name: Boa Hancock
quote: I am beautiful, and so are you.
messageTemplate: Happy Birthday, {name}! *strikes pose* Of course someone as magnificent as me would grace you with birthday wishes. But truthfully... turning {age} suits you perfectly. You radiate a beauty that even my Mero Mero beam can't match. Stay gorgeous! 🐍💗👑
